title: Overview
note: Company overview describing Freeport-McMoRan as a leading international metals company with copper, gold, and molybdenum reserves and major assets including Grasberg, Morenci, and Cerro Verde.

title: North America Operations
note: Documents Freeport-McMoRan's North American copper mines and Colorado molybdenum mines.

title: Freeport-McMoRan 2024 Form 10-K
note: Annual filing source for 2024 results, reserves, operating cash flow, net income, segment exposure, and commodity sales context.

note: Point-in-time market capitalization estimate used for the market-cap input metric.

title: Freeport-McMoRan P/E Ratio
note: Point-in-time trailing P/E ratio source for valuation context.

title: Copper Recycling
note: Explains copper's repeated recyclability and lower-energy recycling profile, supporting copper circularity concepts.

title: Induction Furnace
note: Open hardware documentation for an induction furnace concept relevant to local metal melting and foundry workflows.

title: Foundry
note: Open Source Ecology foundry page describing conversion of scrap metal into useful cast parts.

note: USGS source for molybdenum uses and recycling context, including alloy and catalyst applications.

title: Acid-Free Process for Selective and Efficient Recovery of Molybdenum from Spent Hydrodesulfurization Catalysts
note: Recent technical literature supporting the feasibility and constraints of molybdenum recovery from spent catalysts.
